productDisplayName: Arrow Sports Men Stripes Grey T-Shirt
description: Composition Grey polo T-shirt with black stripes, made of 100% compact cotton, has a ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidery on both sides of the chest, striping along the shoulder and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Medium heat steam iron do not iron on decorations Don that sporty look in ease with this polo T-shirt from arrow. Crafted from compact cotton and designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size S on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
